name: check_leave_balance
description: Check the leave balance for an employee. Returns remaining annual leave, medical leave, and unpaid leave days for the current year.

name: apply_leave
description: Apply for leave on behalf of an employee. Creates a leave request that will be pending approval. The leave balance must be sufficient.

leave_type.description: Type of leave. Must be one of: 'annual_leave', 'medical_leave', 'unpaid_leave'

start_date.description: Start date of leave in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. '2026-02-16'

end_date.description: End date of leave in YYYY-MM-DD format (inclusive), e.g. '2026-02-17'

reason.description: Reason for taking leave, e.g. 'Family vacation'

name: list_available_rooms
description: List all available meeting rooms with their capacity, location, and facilities. Use this when the user asks about meeting rooms or needs to see what rooms are available.

name: search_meeting_rooms
description: Search for available meeting rooms based on their capacity, features, and availability on a specific date/time. Use this when the user asks for a room for a specific number of people (capacity) or with specific amenities.

date.description: Date for the booking in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. '2026-02-14'

start_time.description: Start time in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. '14:00'

end_time.description: End time in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. '15:00'

capacity.description: Optional. Minimum capacity required, e.g., 4 for 'find me a room for 4 people'

features.description: Optional. Required amenities separated by comma, e.g. 'whiteboard,projector'

name: book_meeting_room
description: Book a meeting room for a specific date and time. The room must be available at the requested time slot. Use list_available_rooms first if you need to find room IDs.

room_id.description: The room ID to book, e.g. 'room_a', 'room_b', 'room_c'. You can also use the room name.

date.description: Date for the booking in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. '2026-02-14'

start_time.description: Start time in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. '14:00'

end_time.description: End time in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. '15:00'

purpose.description: Purpose of the meeting, e.g. 'Team standup'

name: check_ticket_status
description: Check the status of IT support tickets for an employee. Shows all open, in-progress, and recently resolved tickets.

name: create_ticket
description: Create a new IT support ticket. The ticket will be assigned to the IT team for resolution.

category.description: Ticket category. Must be one of: 'hardware', 'software', 'network', 'access', 'other'

subject.description: Brief subject line for the ticket, e.g. 'Laptop not charging'

priority.description: Priority level. Must be one of: 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent'. Default is 'medium'.

name: list_shuttle_routes
description: List all available corporate shuttle routes and their departure times.

name: book_shuttle
description: Book a seat on a corporate shuttle for a specific route and time.

route_id.description: The ID of the shuttle route, e.g. 'SH001'

name: list_training_courses
description: List all currently available professional training courses and seminars.

name: enroll_training
description: Enroll an employee in a professional training course.

course_id.description: The ID of the training course, e.g. 'TRN_001'

name: list_wellness_activities
description: List all upcoming health, fitness, and wellness activities (yoga, health checkups, workshops).

name: join_wellness
description: Register an employee for an upcoming wellness activity.

activity_id.description: The ID of the wellness activity, e.g. 'WL001'

name: join_wellness_activity
description: Register an employee for an upcoming wellness activity. (Alias for join_wellness)

activity_id.description: The ID of the wellness activity, e.g. 'WL001'
